title: RNC footage of Trump praying misconstrued as him sleeping | Fact check
shortDescription: The clip shows Trump closing his eyes while a speaker recited a prayer, not falling asleep.

title: Post distorts White House response about Trump, rhetoric | Fact check
shortDescription: Jean-Pierre did not make the statement attributed to her. What she said is "just going to continue" is Biden's condemnation of violence.

title: Transcript: Donald Trump's RNC acceptance speech
shortDescription: During the last night of the Republican National Convention Donald Trump took the stage to officially accept his presidential nomination.

title: Biden's COVID symptoms improve, but he's still on the mend, doctor says.
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's primary COVID-19 symptoms remain a loose cough and hoarseness, but he's responding well to treatment, his doctor says.

title: Foreign ambassadors brace for second Trump term at RNC
shortDescription: Ambassadors shared concern and resolve as they prepare for another potential Trump administration.

title: New Super PAC to push Biden's exit in 'Morning Joe' ads
shortDescription: The group Pass the Torch launched 12 days after Biden's train-wreck debate against Donald Trump.

title: Biden warns of Trump's 'dark vision' amid calls for him to drop out
shortDescription: Joe Biden, facing more calls to drop out of the presidential race, slams Donald Trump's acceptance speech at the Republican National Convention.

title: AOC warns Democrats against replacing Joe Biden on 2024 ticket
shortDescription: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., said that many who want Biden to drop out don't want Vice President Kamala Harris on the ticket either.

title: Biden: hay que prepararse para la próxima pandemia, no crearla | Hechos
shortDescription: Biden dijo que se necesitaría más dinero para financiar ante preparación ante una futura pandemia, no para crearla. Traducción omite una palabra clave.

title: Biden said to prepare for next pandemic, not create one | Fact check
shortDescription: Biden said more money would be needed to fund preparation for a future pandemic, not to create one. A Spanish translation omits a key word.

title: Trump appears to miss kiss with Melania after RNC speech
shortDescription: The former president concluded his acceptance speech and went in for the kiss. His wife appeared to dodge the attempt.

title: GOP Senate candidates riding high after RNC, eyeing Trump's return
shortDescription: The convention in Milwaukee featured a dozen Senate candidates speaking back-to-back-to-back on Tuesday evening.

title: At RNC, Mike Johnson goes from little-known backbencher to VIP
shortDescription: Speaker Mike Johnson's convention week included high-profile speaking slots, charting the GOP's 2025 agenda and wining and dining donors.

title: Was Barron Trump at the RNC? What to know
shortDescription: Trump's son Barron did not appear at the 2024 Republican National Convention.

title: At RNC, Gen Z voters tell why they are supporting the Republican Party
shortDescription: Millions of young people will be casting their first ballot for president in the 2024 election. These voters explain why they support Donald Trump.

title: Melania Trump supports husband Donald Trump at RNC
shortDescription: Melania Trump came out in solidarity with her husband, Donald Trump, and family at the Republican National Convention.

title: Donald Trump accepts Republican nomination at RNC | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Melania Trump raises eyebrows by not making a speech at the RNC. Plus, the Paris Olympics will feature an ambitious broadcast plan.

title: Biden-Harris' support among Black women leaders remains strong
shortDescription: Black women activists and faith leaders pushed back against calls for Biden to step down, pledging their support for the Biden/Harris ticket

title: Why Biden says DNC delegates are 'free to do whatever they want'
shortDescription: Explaining why DNC delegates in Chicago are within their power to vote for someone besides Biden even though he won their primaries earlier this year.

title: Trump returns to campaign trail uncertain who he's running against
shortDescription: Trump plans to spend Friday at his golf club in New Jersey before joining VP running mate JD Vance in Grand Rapids, Mich., for a Saturday rally.

title: Did the Secret Service's delayed evacuation fail to protect Trump?
shortDescription: That Donald Trump stopped and stood upright when leaving the stage after the assassination attempt is another possible failure by Secret Service.

title: How long was Donald Trump's RNC acceptance speech? Record-setting
shortDescription: Donald Trump accepted the nomination for Republican presidential candidate in Milwaukee. He spoke for more than 92 minutes, the longest in history.

title: Donald Trump shares the immigration chart that he says saved his life
shortDescription: Donald Trump shared the immigration chart he was trying to see right before his assassination attempt on Saturday at a Pennsylvania rally.

title: Trump recuenta por primera vez momento en que sufrió atentado
shortDescription: El ex presidente Donald Trump detalló durante su discurso en la convención republicana los momentos después de que una bala impactó su oido.

title: United Auto Workers criticize Trump after he blasts union leader
shortDescription: Donald Trump's assertion that the UAW leader “should be fired” drew a swift social media response from Shawn Fain.

title: Trump talks faith in God at emotional RNC speech
shortDescription: Trump said God was on his side as a would-be assassin fired shots at him last Saturday. His remarks capped an RNC awash with religious language.
